notes: Backfilled from git history and spec shipped dates. Records pre-date the sequencer — the sequencer was not yet in place when these features shipped. From 2026-04-02 onward all activations must go through record_activation().

activations.notes: VIX-rank adaptive Kelly fraction added to risk.py calculate_position_size() Layer 1. Backfilled — exact commit unknown.

VIX-based momentum/mean-reversion router shipped 2026-03-30. Shipped same day as IC-weighted scoring — this is the root cause of the attribution gap. Both should have had a 1-week window between them.
